englishDefinitions: A very rude expression used to show strong anger, contempt, or defiance.
An offensive way to tell someone to go away or stop bothering you.
examples: He shouted a rude insult and told them to kiss his crippled ass.
That expression is extremely offensive and should not be used in polite conversation.
The character says, 'kiss my crippled ass,' to show that he is furious.
